description: Top level: one key per role-tag from the field menu, plus `summary`. Each role's value is a mapping of field-tag → {recommendation, alternatives}.

summary.description: 3–5 sentences on overall stack shape and any trade-offs worth flagging.

additionalProperties.description: One role's stack picks — keys are field-tags from the role's stack template.

recommendation.description: The single best fit for this brief. For optional fields, may be the literal string `none`.

alternatives.description: 2–4 other viable picks the user could swap in.

examples.title: Stack picks for a web app

example.summary: Boring Python stack on a low-ops host. Skipped IaC because scale does not justify it yet. Alternatives listed in case the user disagrees.
